function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "D"."Fiscal Year",
  SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
  SUM("S"."Total Product Cost") AS "total_cost",
  SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") / NULLIF(SUM("S"."Sales Amount"), 0)) * 100 AS "gross_margin_pct",

FROM "Sales" AS "S"
JOIN "Date" AS "D"
  ON "S"."OrderDateKey" = "D"."DateKey"
GROUP BY
  "D"."Fiscal Year"
ORDER BY
  "D"."Fiscal Year" ASC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "P"."Product",
  "P"."Category",
  "P"."Subcategory",
  SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "revenue",
  SUM("S"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
  SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (SUM("S"."Sales Amount" - "S"."Total Product Cost") / SUM("S"."Sales Amount")) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" AS "S"
JOIN "Product" AS "P" ON "S"."ProductKey" = "P"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "P"."Product", "P"."Category", "P"."Subcategory"
ORDER BY "revenue" DESC
LIMIT 10;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "C"."Customer",

questionLabel: [Q10][hard] Show year-over-year revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal years. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_year, prior_revenue, current_year, current_revenue, yoy_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_year all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH YearlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        so."Channel",
        p."Category",
        d."Fiscal Year",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
RevenueComparison AS (
    SELECT
        curr."Channel",
        curr."Category",
        prev."Fiscal Year" AS "prior_year",
        prev."Revenue" AS "prior_revenue",
        curr."Fiscal Year" AS "current_year",
        curr."Revenue" AS "current_revenue"
    FROM YearlyRevenue curr
    JOIN YearlyRevenue prev ON curr."Channel" = prev."Channel"
        AND curr."Category" = prev."Category"
        AND CAST(curr."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) = CAST(prev."Fiscal Year" AS INTEGER) + 1
)
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_year",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_year",
    "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "yoy_growth_pct"
FROM RevenueComparison
ORDER BY "Channel", "Category", "prior_year" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q21][hard] Show total revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the category, realized discount percentage versus that average list price, gross profit, and margin percentage by sales channel and product category. Return columns: Channel, Category, total_revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, realized_discount_pct, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT
  "so"."Channel",
  "p"."Category",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") AS "total_revenue",
  SUM("s"."Order Quantity") AS "units_sold",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount") / NULLIF(SUM("s"."Order Quantity"), 0) AS "revenue_per_unit",
  AVG("p"."List Price") AS "avg_list_price",
  (1 - (SUM("s"."Sales Amount") / NULLIF(SUM("s"."Order Quantity") * AVG("p"."List Price"), 0))) * 100 AS "realized_discount_pct",
  SUM("s"."Sales Amount" - "s"."Total Product Cost") AS "gross_profit",
  (SUM("s"."Sales Amount" - "s"."Total Product Cost") / NULLIF(SUM("s"."Sales Amount"), 0)) * 100 AS "margin_pct"
FROM "Sales" AS "s"
JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "so" ON "s"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "so"."SalesOrderLineKey"
JOIN "Product" AS "p" ON "s"."ProductKey" = "p"."ProductKey"
GROUP BY "so"."Channel", "p"."Category"
ORDER BY "so"."Channel" ASC, "total_revenue" DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q22][hard] Show quarter-over-quarter revenue growth by channel and product category, comparing consecutive fiscal quarters. Return columns: Channel, Category, prior_quarter, prior_revenue, current_quarter, current_revenue, qoq_growth_pct. Sort by Channel, Category, then prior_quarter all ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH QuarterlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        so."Channel",
        p."Category",
        d."Fiscal Year",
        d."Fiscal Quarter",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS "Revenue"
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey"
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    JOIN "Date" d ON s."OrderDateKey" = d."DateKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4
),
LaggedRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "Channel",
        "Category",
        "Fiscal Year" || ' ' || "Fiscal Quarter" AS "current_quarter",
        "Revenue" AS "current_revenue",
        LAG("Fiscal Year" || ' ' || "Fiscal Quarter") OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category" ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS "prior_quarter",
        LAG("Revenue") OVER (PARTITION BY "Channel", "Category" ORDER BY "Fiscal Year", "Fiscal Quarter") AS "prior_revenue"
    FROM QuarterlyRevenue
)
SELECT
    "Channel",
    "Category",
    "prior_quarter",
    "prior_revenue",
    "current_quarter",
    "current_revenue",
    (("current_revenue" - "prior_revenue") / "prior_revenue") * 100 AS "qoq_growth_pct"
FROM LaggedRevenue
WHERE "prior_quarter" IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY "Channel", "Category", "prior_quarter" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q23][hard] For each product category, list the top 2 subcategories by revenue, showing revenue rank within the category, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and revenue share percentage within the category. function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH CategorySubcategorySales AS (
    SELECT
        p."Category",
        p."Subcategory",
        SUM(s."Sales Amount") AS revenue,
        SUM(s."Order Quantity") AS units_sold,
        SUM(s."Sales Amount" - s."Total Product Cost") AS gross_profit
    FROM "Sales" s
    JOIN "Product" p ON s."ProductKey" = p."ProductKey"
    GROUP BY p."Category", p."Subcategory"
),
CategoryTotals AS (
    SELECT
        "Category",
        SUM(revenue) AS total_category_revenue
    FROM CategorySubcategorySales
    GROUP BY "Category"
),
RankedSubcategories AS (
    SELECT
        css."Category",
        css."Subcategory",
        css.revenue,
        css.units_sold,
        css.gross_profit,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY css."Category" ORDER BY css.revenue DESC) AS revenue_rank,
        (css.revenue / ct.total_category_revenue) * 100 AS category_revenue_share_pct
    FROM CategorySubcategorySales css
    JOIN CategoryTotals ct ON css."Category" = ct."Category"
)
SELECT
    "Category",
    revenue_rank,
    "Subcategory",
    revenue,
    units_sold,
    gross_profit,
    category_revenue_share_pct
FROM RankedSubcategories
WHERE revenue_rank <= 2
ORDER BY "Category" ASC, revenue_rank ASC, "Subcategory" ASC;"}

questionLabel: [Q25][hard] For each territory group and fiscal year, show the top sales channel by revenue, along with that channel's revenue, the total revenue for the group-year, and the channel's share of the group-year revenue. Return columns: Group, Fiscal Year, top_channel, channel_revenue, group_year_revenue, channel_revenue_share_pct. Sort by Group, then Fiscal Year ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"WITH GroupYearChannelRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "ST"."Group",
        "D"."Fiscal Year",
        "SO"."Channel",
        SUM("S"."Sales Amount") AS "ChannelRevenue"
    FROM "Sales" AS "S"
    JOIN "Sales_Territory" AS "ST" ON "S"."SalesTerritoryKey" = "ST"."SalesTerritoryKey"
    JOIN "Date" AS "D" ON "S"."OrderDateKey" = "D"."DateKey"
    JOIN "Sales_Order" AS "SO" ON "S"."SalesOrderLineKey" = "SO"."SalesOrderLineKey"
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
GroupYearTotalRevenue AS (
    SELECT
        "Group",
        "Fiscal Year",
        SUM("ChannelRevenue") AS "GroupYearRevenue"
    FROM GroupYearChannelRevenue
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
RankedChannels AS (
    SELECT
        "GYCR"."Group",
        "GYCR"."Fiscal Year",
        "GYCR"."Channel" AS "top_channel",
        "GYCR"."ChannelRevenue" AS "channel_revenue",
        "GYTR"."GroupYearRevenue" AS "group_year_revenue",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "GYCR"."Group", "GYCR"."Fiscal Year" ORDER BY "GYCR"."ChannelRevenue" DESC) as rn
    FROM GroupYearChannelRevenue AS "GYCR"
    JOIN GroupYearTotalRevenue AS "GYTR" ON "GYCR"."Group" = "GYTR"."Group" AND "GYCR"."Fiscal Year" = "GYTR"."Fiscal Year"
)
SELECT
    "Group",
    "Fiscal Year",
    "top_channel",
    "channel_revenue",
    "group_year_revenue",
    ("channel_revenue" / "group_year_revenue") * 100 AS "channel_revenue_share_pct"
FROM RankedChannels
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "Group", "Fiscal Year";"}
